report.summary: Audited 2 new pages from build-v3 cycle (Cross-Chain Messaging Protocols Guide, Fully Onchain Gaming Guide), fixed 6 UX issues on cross-chain page (broken StructuredData prop, missing Home breadcrumb, missing OG/Twitter metadata, CSS typo, malformed schema call), added Twitter image to gaming page, and created 2 OG images.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: Cross-Chain Messaging Guide: Fixed StructuredData component prop — was using 'schema' (non-existent prop) instead of 'data', causing structured data to not render
Cross-Chain Messaging Guide: Added missing 'Home' breadcrumb link (was only Learn > Guide, now Home > Learn > Guide)
Cross-Chain Messaging Guide: Added full OpenGraph metadata — url, publishedTime, modifiedTime, authors array, and images array for proper social sharing
Cross-Chain Messaging Guide: Added twitter card metadata (summary_large_image, title, description, images) — was completely missing
Cross-Chain Messaging Guide: Fixed CSS typo 'marginBackground' to 'marginBottom' on Wormhole warning box (line ~384), which caused missing bottom spacing
Cross-Chain Messaging Guide: Fixed generateArticleSchema call — added missing required fields (url, dateModified, author, image, wordCount) and corrected 'authors' to 'author' to match interface
Fully Onchain Gaming Guide: Added Twitter images array to metadata for consistent social card rendering

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: OG image: cross-chain-messaging-protocols-guide-2026 (1200x630 SVG) — Dark theme with 4 protocol nodes (LayerZero/Wormhole/Hyperlane/CCIP) connected in network visualization, color-coded per protocol, stats cards (159M+ messages, 168+ chains), DeFi + Infrastructure badges

OG image: fully-onchain-gaming-2026 (1200x630 SVG) — Dark theme with ECS grid pattern, 5 entity nodes in game-world style, 3 framework cards (MUD/Dojo/World Engine) color-coded, stats cards ($65B market, 1000+ TPS, $40M CCP), Gaming + Web3 badges

sections.title: UX Audit Findings (Build-v3 Pages)
items: Cross-Chain Messaging Guide: Well-structured 868-line article with TOC, 10 sections, comparison table with overflowX scroll (minWidth 800px). Uses glass-morphism info boxes throughout. Key issues were all metadata/schema related — the visual layout and content structure are solid.

Fully Onchain Gaming Guide: Excellent implementation — uses clamp() for responsive title, gradient text fill, proper semantic sections, framework comparison table with overflowX scroll (minWidth 900px), game cards with responsive grid, challenges section with color-coded warnings. Uses Next.js Link component for related articles. One of the best-structured pages in the codebase.
